name: gitlab-auth
description: Core auth provider for GitLab-backed catalog discovery, private repo installs, and GitLab-aware tools.

inputs.name: gitlab_token
inputs.label: GitLab Personal Access Token
inputs.description: Used for GitLab API-backed catalog and repo operations.

inputs.name: git_ssh_key
inputs.label: Git SSH Key
inputs.description: Optional SSH key path for private clone workflows.
